entities.name: Divine Majesty

attributes.difficulty: most difficult for one to perceive

entities.raw_quote: it is most difficult for one to perceive the Divine Majesty.

entities.name: God

attributes.nature: provides nourishment to young ravens through mercy

entities.raw_quote: nourished by the mercy of God, as David testified when he said, 'he gives his food to beasts, and to young ravens who cry out.'

entities.name: Bohel

attributes.body_type: long and slender, pale or yellow

entities.raw_quote: But of those certain ones are called Saturnians, and these are: Bohel, Cafziel, Michrathon, Satquiel

entities.name: Cafziel
entities.raw_quote: these are: Bohel, Cafziel, Michrathon, Satquiel

entities.name: Michrathon
entities.raw_quote: these are: Bohel, Cafziel, Michrathon, Satquiel

entities.name: Satquiel
entities.raw_quote: these are: Bohel, Cafziel, Michrathon, Satquiel

entities.name: Maymon
entities.raw_quote: They are these: Maymon the king, Assaibi, Albunalich, Haibalidech, Yasfla, which daemons are subordinate to the Southwest Winds

entities.name: Raphael

attributes.nature: joy, love, gladness; provides dew, flowers, herbs

entities.raw_quote: Others are Jovial and are these: Satquiel, Raphael, Pahamcocihel, Assasaiel

entities.name: Samahel
entities.raw_quote: Others are of Mars and are these: Samahel, Satihel, Yturahihel, Amabiel, and their nature is to provoke wars, murder, destruction

entities.name: Hanahel

attributes.nature: causes laughter, lust, desire; gives flowers and fruit

entities.raw_quote: Others are of Venus, and they are these: Hanahel, Raquiel, Salguyel

entities.name: Mychael

attributes.nature: subjugates spirits; reveals secrets of past, present, and future

entities.raw_quote: Others are of Mercury, and they are these: Mychael, Myhel, Sarapiel

entities.name: Gabriel

attributes.nature: moves will/thinking; speeds journeys; causes rain

entities.raw_quote: Others are of the Moon, and they are these: Gabriel, Michael, Samyel, Atithael

entities.name: Construction of the Circle
entities.raw_quote: Take hard and uniform stones... First, let the circle be level with the ground, and nine feet in width

entities.name: Consecration Prayer

attributes.context: to be said by a priest while consecrating the body of Christ

entities.raw_quote: You, O Lord Jesus Christ... that from the gift and permission of your grace, all those angels which he shall call upon... may you deign to send and constrain them

summary: This chunk details the second treatise of the Liber Juratus, outlining various planetary spirits (Saturnian, Jovial, Martian, etc.), their natures, physical forms, and hierarchies. It also provides specific instructions for the construction of a ritual circle using stones and mortar, and includes a prayer for the invocation of angels.
key_passages: the operator must beware, lest he is in mortal sin, because if so, he will go insane
to know the spirits of the fire, their names, superiors and sigils, powers and virtues
their nature is to cause sadness, anger, and hatred, to create snow and ice together
Take hard and uniform stones, which have no holes or cracks, or otherwise you can use tiles made specifically for this and mortar the stones or tiles together.
You, O Lord Jesus Christ... that from the gift and permission of your grace, all those angels which he shall call upon... may you deign to send and constrain them
